title: diosma vulgaris var. hirsuta
intro: Diosma vulgaris var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy diosma, is a shrub-like plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which are known to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of diosma vulgaris var. hirsuta include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Diosma vulgaris var. hirsuta can be used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
